item.description:
FnMacAssistant v2.1.1

This update restores GitHub as the main source for app updates, repository links, and IPA list fetching now that the GitHub account and Gist are available again.

Changelog

GitHub services restored

- The IPA downloader now checks the GitHub Gist first again.
- The GitLab snippet is still kept as a backup source if the Gist is unavailable.
- The automatic updater now fetches updates from GitHub Pages again.
- App links and release links now point back to GitHub.

Also included from v2.1

Compatibility and reliability

- Fixed issues caused by GitHub's previous account flag.
- Added improvements for the latest version of Fortnite.

IPA Downloader

- Changed IPA downloads tab to fetch the download links from another source.
- The IPA's description now comes from the json.

Automatic updater

- The automatic updater now fetches updates from GitHub Pages.

Thanks for using FnMacAssistant!
If you'd like to support future development, maintenance, and updates like this one, consider using code ISACUCHO in the item shop or in the epic games store.
